name: --force
-f
options.description: Force every question asked to be answered with 'Yes'

name: --root
-r
options.description: Allow mackup to be run as superuser

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List all the supported mackup applications

subcommands.name: backup
subcommands.description: Sync your conf files to your synced storage

subcommands.name: restore
subcommands.description: Link the conf files already in your synced storage on your system

subcommands.name: uninstall
subcommands.description: Reset everything as it was before using Mackup
